text_original: lots of fun. you can sort of direct the story. best part is being able to back track if its not going the way you like.
text_zh: 非常有意思。你可以在某种程度上引导故事的发展。最棒的部分是如果剧情发展不如你意，你可以回溯。
reply_original: I'm so glad you're enjoying the storytelling! Being able to direct the plot and backtrack to explore different paths is exactly what makes Fantasia special. It’s like having a "time travel" button for your adventures! If you ever have ideas to make the experience even better, feel free to share them at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun!
reply_zh: 我很高兴你喜欢这些故事！能够引导剧情走向并回溯探索不同的路径，正是 Fantasia 的特别之处。这就像是为你的冒险开启了一个“时空穿梭”按钮！如果你有任何能让体验变得更好的想法，欢迎随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享。玩得开心！
